+# Prerequisites
+*.d
+
+# Compiled Object files
+*.slo
+*.lo
+*.o
+*.obj
+
+# Precompiled Headers
+*.gch
+*.pch
+
+# Compiled Dynamic libraries
+*.so
+*.dylib
+*.dll
+
+# Fortran module files
+*.mod
+*.smod
+
+# Compiled Static libraries
+*.lai
+*.la
+*.a
+*.lib
+
+# Executables
+*.exe
+*.out
+*.app

@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+# odom_to_tf_ros2
+A simple ros2 node that reads an odom topic and generates the equivalent tf connection

data.author: rachit-aggarwal
data.message: fix the typo in parameter name inverse_tf

data.author: ahcorde
data.message:
Replace ament_target_dependencies with target_link_libraries

Signed-off-by: Alejandro Hernandez Cordero <ahcorde@gmail.com>

files.patch:
@@ -13,12 +13,12 @@ find_package(geometry_msgs REQUIRED)
 find_package(tf2_geometry_msgs REQUIRED)
 
 add_executable(odom_to_tf src/odom_to_tf.cpp)
-ament_target_dependencies(odom_to_tf 
-  rclcpp
-  tf2_ros
-  nav_msgs
-  geometry_msgs
-  tf2_geometry_msgs
+target_link_libraries(odom_to_tf
+  rclcpp::rclcpp
+  tf2_ros::tf2_ros
+  ${nav_msgs_TARGETS}
+  ${geometry_msgs_TARGETS}
+  ${tf2_geometry_msgs_TARGETS}
 )
 
 install(TARGETS odom_to_tf

@@ -11,6 +11,7 @@ find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
 # further dependencies manually.
 find_package(rclcpp REQUIRED)
 find_package(tf2_ros REQUIRED)
+find_package(tf2_geometry_msgs REQUIRED)
 find_package(nav_msgs REQUIRED)
 find_package(geometry_msgs REQUIRED)
 
@@ -26,7 +27,13 @@ if(BUILD_TESTING)
 endif()
 
 add_executable(odom_to_tf src/odom_to_tf.cpp)
-ament_target_dependencies(odom_to_tf rclcpp tf2_ros nav_msgs geometry_msgs)
+ament_target_dependencies(odom_to_tf 
+  rclcpp
+  tf2_ros
+  tf2_geometry_msgs
+  nav_msgs
+  geometry_msgs
+)
 
 install(TARGETS odom_to_tf
   DESTINATION lib/${PROJECT_NAME})
